series_metadata.series_description: Tracks process of payment in lieu of providing transportation services. This record is for students that were declared eligible but impractical for transportation services according to revised code 3327.02

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: , provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Paper: , provided records have been audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
